credentials: PHD 1985 Fac Des Sci Agro DE Gembloux
name: Patrick MASSON

ratings.comment: Tough material imo, but a great guy. Hard to understand sometimes, but he really tries his best to clear up any confusion as a result of his accent. I liked him better than the other professor for 468 (Sharp)

Professor Masson is very passionate about teaching genetics to students. He's always available to answering questions until you really understand what's going on. His accent can be difficult to understand sometimes.
Patrick is a decent lecturer but has a thick French accent so he's a bit difficult to understand. Once you get used to his accent, you're usually fine.

He is a great lecturer and asks questions about the assign readings (scientific papers which are fairly interesting). I wish I could take another class with him,he is great and really wants you to think and feel free to ask questions. He explains in detail so that everyone gets the basics.
